title: Hamed Ahmadi
text: Home * People * Hamed Ahmadi Hamed Ahmadi [1] Hamed Ahmadi , an Iranian computer scientist, electrical engineer , and lecturer at the University of York with previous affiliations at Trinity College Dublin , University College Dublin , Beijing Dublin International College , Sheffield Hallam University and University of Essex . He received a B.Sc. degree in computer software engineering from Ferdowsi University of Mashhad in 2004, a M.Sc. degree in computer engineering from National Aerospace University of Ukraine in 2008, and his Ph.D. in electrical and computer engineering from National University of Singapore in 2012 [2] . His research interests include next generation of mobile systems , self-organizing networks , internet of things , optimization , machine learning , game and auction theory , and evolutionary algorithms . In the early 2000s, he developed an Othello program HamedReversi and the chess program HamedChess , both still available for download [3] . In 2003, his entry DarwinCaissa applying genetic algorithms , became 4th at the CodeCup 2003 competition [4] , playing the game of Caïssa [5] [6] . His Alquerque entry Beta became third at the CodeCup 2008 competition [7] .
